data.name: SEX Police 🔞🚨
data.detailed_description:
In Sex Police, you’re not just any cop – you’re the one assigned to take down the city’s most dangerous criminals, from a cartel queen to an arms-dealing hooker. Will you take the path of a crooked cop making deals in dark corners, or remain the relentless enforcer with a taste for justice?

Your choices will shape your reputation and influence the story in surprising ways. You’ll uncover backstories and hidden motives, navigating a tense web of crime, betrayal, and hot encounters. From gathering evidence to getting confessions, each interaction allows you to unlock secrets that could bring down an empire – or make you a part of it.

You’ll face intense interrogations and complex characters, each with their own desires and demands. Play as a “bad cop” who makes his own rules, or a straight shooter unwilling to compromise. Gain the loyalty (or disdain) of characters as your actions unlock multiple endings that reflect the path you’ve chosen.

Meet dangerous women, interact with your cop partner and don’t forget about your girlfriend too! Explore their motives, desires, bodies and souls through the story and adult scenes. The game invites you for a ride filled with adult themes, mini-games, attentively crafted 3D visuals and intriguing plot - are you ready to cross the line, or will you uphold the law?


Features:
  • Adult Scenes 🔞- enjoy animated 18+ scenes with characters in various locations and settings.
  • Intense Story 📖- meet dangerous women, explore different paths and endings and find out what it all leads to.
  • Choices ➰- build your reputation and decide how the story goes - your decisions impact the outcomes.
  • Mini-games 🎮- solve crimes via interrogation and evidence matching as a little breather from the story.
  • Complex Characters 👩- explore the bodies and souls of outlaw women, colleagues and your girlfriend.
  • High quality visuals 🌟- 3D graphics and animation designed and crafted for your enjoyment.

data.short_description: Welcome to SEX Police 🔞🚨, where you’re the city’s last line of defense! Take down the city’s most dangerous women, choose between justice and vice, and uncover the secrets hidden behind every interrogation. Will you clean up the streets or get entangled in the crime underworld?
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: Apple M1 або Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
